_comment: Answers for `databricks bundle init` -> sdp-meta DAB template, scenario A2: combined bronze+silver in ONE Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline (pipeline_mode=combined) reading cloudFiles. Same demo data + recipe as `cloudfiles_split.json`; only `bundle_name` and `pipeline_mode` differ. {uc_catalog_name} is substituted by demo/launch_dab_template_demo.py at runtime.
author: dab-template-demo
